violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener taken to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The auto-dispenser for the sanitizing solution was not dispensing at proper concentration. Establishment has quaternary ammonium tablets for use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
